ExcludedRequirement.description: The requirement an exclusion targets: its id plus statement text.

id.description: Requirement id (or fnmatch glob) to drop.
id.title: Id
id.markdownDescription: Requirement id (or fnmatch glob) to drop.

statement.description: The requirement's statement text, copied from the baseline for at-a-glance review. Null for glob ids that don't resolve to one requirement.
statement.title: Statement
statement.markdownDescription: The requirement's statement text, copied from the baseline for at-a-glance review. Null for glob ids that don't resolve to one requirement.

ExcludedRequirement.title: ExcludedRequirement
ExcludedRequirement.markdownDescription: The requirement an exclusion targets: its id plus statement text.

LockExclusion.description: One requirement-level exclusion recorded in the lock.

requirement.description: The excluded requirement: its id and statement text.
requirement.markdownDescription: The excluded requirement: its id and statement text.

reason.description: Human-readable rationale; surfaced in logs and reports.
reason.title: Reason
reason.markdownDescription: Human-readable rationale; surfaced in logs and reports.

source.description: Where this entry came from. `config` mirrors cle.yaml's `requirements.exclude`; `agent` was inferred by the onboarding agent.
source.markdownDescription: Where this entry came from. `config` mirrors cle.yaml's `requirements.exclude`; `agent` was inferred by the onboarding agent.

LockExclusion.title: LockExclusion
LockExclusion.markdownDescription: One requirement-level exclusion recorded in the lock.

OpenQuestion.description: One question the onboarding agent surfaced to the human via `ask_human`.

id.description: Stable kebab-case slug for cross-run identity. Generated by the interactive handler from the question text; unique within a single lock.
id.title: Id
id.markdownDescription: Stable kebab-case slug for cross-run identity. Generated by the interactive handler from the question text; unique within a single lock.

why.description: One sentence on what the agent observed that motivated the question; carried so reviewers can see the context.
why.title: Why
why.markdownDescription: One sentence on what the agent observed that motivated the question; carried so reviewers can see the context.

affects.description: Requirement ids the answer bears on. Surfaced by `cle review` when re-asking so the user sees impact.
affects.title: Affects
affects.markdownDescription: Requirement ids the answer bears on. Surfaced by `cle review` when re-asking so the user sees impact.

status.description: `open` — user skipped at ask-time. `answered` — `answer` is populated.
status.markdownDescription: `open` — user skipped at ask-time. `answered` — `answer` is populated.

choices.description: Choices the agent offered alongside this question, if any. Empty when the question was free-text. Preserved so `cle review` can re-render the same menu when resurfacing an open question.
choices.title: Choices
choices.markdownDescription: Choices the agent offered alongside this question, if any. Empty when the question was free-text. Preserved so `cle review` can re-render the same menu when resurfacing an open question.

OpenQuestion.title: OpenQuestion
OpenQuestion.markdownDescription: One question the onboarding agent surfaced to the human via `ask_human`.

QuestionChoice.description:
One row the agent offered alongside an `ask_human` question.

Preserved in the lock so `cle review` can re-render the same menu
when resurfacing an open question. `label` is the row title;
`description` is the one-line clarification shown beneath it.

label.description: Row title the user saw highlighted in the menu.
label.title: Label
label.markdownDescription: Row title the user saw highlighted in the menu.

description.description: One-line clarification shown beneath the row when focused.
description.title: Description
description.markdownDescription: One-line clarification shown beneath the row when focused.

QuestionChoice.title: QuestionChoice
QuestionChoice.markdownDescription:
One row the agent offered alongside an `ask_human` question.

Preserved in the lock so `cle review` can re-render the same menu
when resurfacing an open question. `label` is the row title;
`description` is the one-line clarification shown beneath it.

schema_version.description: Lock schema version. Bumped on breaking changes.
schema_version.title: Schema Version
schema_version.markdownDescription: Lock schema version. Bumped on breaking changes.

baseline.description: Baseline this artifact was generated against. Mirrors `cle.yaml`'s `baseline` at the last init/sync. If it diverges, `cle verify` warns to run `cle sync`.
baseline.title: Baseline
baseline.markdownDescription: Baseline this artifact was generated against. Mirrors `cle.yaml`'s `baseline` at the last init/sync. If it diverges, `cle verify` warns to run `cle sync`.

generated_at_sha.description: Git commit `HEAD` was at when the lock was last written. `cle sync --since` reads diffs from this SHA to refresh.
generated_at_sha.title: Generated At Sha
generated_at_sha.markdownDescription: Git commit `HEAD` was at when the lock was last written. `cle sync --since` reads diffs from this SHA to refresh.

config_exclusions_hash.description: Hash of cle.yaml's `requirements.exclude` block at last sync. `cle verify` recomputes and compares; mismatch means the user added or edited exclusions and should run `cle sync` to merge them into the lock.
config_exclusions_hash.title: Config Exclusions Hash
config_exclusions_hash.markdownDescription: Hash of cle.yaml's `requirements.exclude` block at last sync. `cle verify` recomputes and compares; mismatch means the user added or edited exclusions and should run `cle sync` to merge them into the lock.

exclusions.description: Merged exclusions — agent-discovered entries plus the user-authored ones copied from `cle.yaml` at last sync. Sorted by requirement id (natural order) for stable diffs across `cle sync` runs.
exclusions.title: Exclusions
exclusions.markdownDescription: Merged exclusions — agent-discovered entries plus the user-authored ones copied from `cle.yaml` at last sync. Sorted by requirement id (natural order) for stable diffs across `cle sync` runs.

open_questions.description: Questions the onboarding agent asked the human via `ask_human` during init/sync. Answered entries are kept so subsequent runs don't re-ask; open / unknown entries are re-surfaced by `cle review`. Sorted by id for stable diffs.
open_questions.title: Open Questions
open_questions.markdownDescription: Questions the onboarding agent asked the human via `ask_human` during init/sync. Answered entries are kept so subsequent runs don't re-ask; open / unknown entries are re-surfaced by `cle review`. Sorted by id for stable diffs.
